groups.noCredentialsTooltip: You must configure a password or fingerprint before using management mode

members_tab.availabilityHint: Set when this member is unavailable (vacation, sick leave, etc.). The solver will not assign them during these times.

tasks_tab.subShiftsDesc: Press + to split the shift into equal parts

roles_tab.adminOnly: Role management is available to admins only
roles_tab.explainerBody: Roles define what each member is allowed to see and do in this group. Every member can hold exactly one role — unlike qualifications, roles are not stackable.
roles_tab.singleRoleNote: Each member can hold only one role at a time. Assigning a new role replaces the previous one.
roles_tab.memberRolesHint: Each member can hold exactly one role.
roles_tab.permViewDesc: Can see the schedule, members, and alerts. Cannot make any changes.
roles_tab.permViewAndEditDesc: Can edit tasks, constraints, and member details. Cannot publish schedules or manage roles.
roles_tab.permOwnerDesc: Full access — can publish schedules, manage roles, and transfer ownership.

settings_tab.autoPublishDesc: Automatically publish the schedule when the solver completes successfully
settings_tab.deleteConfirm: Are you sure? The group will be archived and can be restored later.
settings_tab.adminOnly: Settings are available to admins only
settings_tab.solverStartFromHint: Empty = start from now. Set a fixed date/time for the auto-scheduler to use.
settings_tab.inviteLinkDesc: Share this link with people to let them join your group instantly.
settings_tab.minRestBetweenShiftsDesc: Minimum hours of rest between two consecutive shifts. The solver enforces this automatically.
settings_tab.minRestZeroWarning: ⚠ No minimum rest — suitable for restaurants etc.
settings_tab.allowMembersViewHistoryDesc: Allow group members to view past schedules
settings_tab.managementTimeoutDesc: Minutes of inactivity before the admin is prompted to confirm continued activity in management mode.
settings_tab.managementTimeoutError: Timeout must be a whole number between 5 and 120 minutes.

stats_tab.publishToSeeStats: Publish a schedule to see data

schedule_tab.draftReady: Draft schedule ready for review and publication
schedule_tab.discardConfirmText: Are you sure you want to discard this draft? This action cannot be undone.
schedule_tab.infeasibleDesc: The solver could not build a schedule with the current constraints.
schedule_tab.infeasibleSolution: Solutions: add more members, extend the time horizon, or relax constraints.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.loadErrorDesc: Something went wrong. Try refreshing the page.
profile.exportDataDesc: Download all your personal data as a JSON file. Includes your profile, group memberships, assignments, and notifications.
profile.feedbackDesc: Found a bug or have an idea for improvement? Send us a message and we'll get back to you.
profile.deleteAccountDesc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This cannot be undone.
profile.deleteConfirmText: Are you sure? This will permanently delete your account, all your data, and remove you from all groups.

deactivationDialog.description: The emergency freeze will be lifted and normal scheduling will resume.
deactivationDialog.noChanges: No schedule changes were made during the freeze period.
deactivationDialog.fetchError: Unable to load change summary. You can still deactivate the freeze without discarding.

deactivationDialog.discardUnavailable: Cannot determine changes — discard option unavailable.
